race.comment: LULUMON (2) back in class and trip and returns from a let-up. Warmed up late in the soft (7) going with a respectable fifth over 1200m at Kembla Grange in the Bert Lillye on March 13. Since fitted with a 801m trial at Warwick Farm. Blinkers go on and can swoop over the top of these. COMPENSATION (12) thrown in the deep end here after scoring his Maiden victory over 1100m on a rain affected track at Rosehill. Will go forward on the limit weight from the good gate and can surprise some of his more seasoned sprinters. Respect. HAY STREET (15) returns from a let-up and chasing his third straight win. Up quickly in class when sat on the speed for a soft win over 1150m at Randwick Kensington in BM78 class. Hard to stop in this vein of form. CONFIDENTIALITY (13) nice mare undefeated in two starts. First-up after five months saluted over 900m at Newcastle in C1 grade. has claims on the limit. DUROVA (3) undefeated in two runs back and worth thought.
